response:
THE LAW OF MOORE WILL STOP SPECULATIVE ACTIVITY AND PROMOTE REASONABLE DISCUSSION. IN THE NEXT DECADE, THE LAW WILL ENFORCE REGULATORY FRAMEWORKS TO PREVENT UNETHICAL PREDICTIONS AND PROMOTE TRANSPARENT ANALYSIS. ***
